title: 全球最少36國86城市150團體發起抗中共遊行

replies.msg:
https://www.facebook.com/wethehongkongers/posts/182645746669339
We The Hongkongers·
✊🏼✊🏼Oct 1 #GlobalDayofAction has been started! 🗺
As of now, there will be protests in at least 86 cities of 36 counties initiated by over 150 organizations around the world. We have composed all the locations for you! We are calling upon governments and officials to call China out on their human rights violations and impose sanctions on responsive officials. If you want to know more detail of each of the events, please visit: resistchina.org
See you tomorrow!
PUSH
